metadata.purpose: Canonical task-to-agents routing configuration with P0 rules enforced
metadata.note: Use this config in spawner-matrix.jl to ensure correct agent selection per task type

research.notes: Chronicle and Codex removed (P0 fix). Scout owns research tasks.

code.notes: Codex owns code development. Veritas for code review. Phase 12A: Ghost for optimization.

security.notes: Sentinel removed (P0 fix). Cipher owns security. Phase 12A: Guardian for compliance.

documentation.notes: Chronicle owns documentation. Phase 12A: Mentor for training docs.

testing.notes: QA owns testing. Sentinel for infrastructure testing.

infrastructure.notes: Sentinel owns infrastructure/DevOps. Phase 12A: Delta for change management.

review.notes: New task type (P0). Veritas leads code review. Cipher for security review.

analysis.notes: Lens owns analysis. Phase 12A: Analyst-Perf for performance analysis.

optimization.notes: New task type (Phase 12A). Ghost specializes in code optimization.

compliance.notes: New task type (Phase 12A). Guardian specializes in compliance/audit.

training.notes: New task type (Phase 12A). Mentor specializes in knowledge sharing.

p0_rules: QA is NOT in code (only testing)
